  "findings": [
    "Grounding electrode conductor (GEC) spliced improperly",
    "Non-compliant connection method used on the grounding electrode system"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut out the improper splice",
    "Re-splice the grounding electrode conductor using an irreversible compression connector, exothermic welding, or replace with a continuous unspliced conductor"
  ],
  "rationale": "The grounding electrode conductor (GEC) must be continuous without splice unless joined by irreversible compression-type connectors listed for the purpose or by exothermic welding, as per NEC 250.64(C). An improper splice violates code and compromises the low-impedance path to earth, posing a high safety risk.",

    "NEC 250.68"
  ]
